title: verbascum virgatum
intro: Verbascum virgatum, also known as Spiked Mullein or Jersey Mullein, is a perennial plant that belongs to the figwort family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and act as an expectorant. The health benefits of Verbascum virgatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and wounds.
